title: lithocarpus congtroiensis
intro: Lithocarpus congtroiensis, also known as the Chinese walnut, is a plant species in the family Fagaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lithocarpus congtroiensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of fever and cough. Lithocarpus congtroiensis is typically prepared as a tea or an extract, with herbal preparations often involving the use of its leaves, bark, or roots.
